Algarve is Our Campus

Study
and Research
in Algarve is
our campus

whyalgarve
Why Algarve?
A treasury of life
A living laboratory
An innovation center
A local contribution to global challenge
A space of creative industries
An education & training hub
ourpotencial
Our potential
People, synergies and a sea of opportunities

Here, the concept of proximity is widely experienced, without any barriers between the community, providing closer contact, aimed at adapting the experience and background of each individual to their patterns of expectation, progress and learning.
The privileged location of the region, next to Faro International Airport, and the large number of new air routes connecting to several European cities, as well as the excellent conditions, combined with the synergies it establishes with the business ecosystem, allow to this peripheral area to acquire a central and international status, converging into a sea of opportunities.

In this sense, the University of Algarve joins efforts with the region, combining history and tradition with contemporaneity.

The Academy is also recognized for the quality of its teaching in several fields, particularly in the areas of Science and Health Technologies; Economics, Management and Tourism; Social Sciences and Education; and Exact and Natural Sciences, standing out internationally in various rankings. More information about the rankings here.
​​​​​​​

Partilhar
  • Synergies
  • People
  • Sea of opportunities
meetingpoint
Meeting Point
  • “Freedom to research”
  • “New perspectives to improve your country”
  • “Personalized programs adapted to the reality of each student”
  • “A university adapted to cultural diversity”
  • “A young and competitive university”
rni
Research & Innovation

Our leading research becomes a reference in areas such as marine sciences, science and health technologies, tourism, and engineering and technologies, creating prosperity, improve quality of life, protect the environment and enrich our culture.   ​​​​​​​

Partilhar
  • Culatra 2030 – Sustainable Energy Community

    The creation of an Energy Transition Agenda on the island of Culatra, in the heart of Ria Formosa, will position the region as a center of excellence in research and training in renewable energies.

  • Decoding the evolution of breast cancer

    The DEvoCancer project aims to contribute to the identification and characterization of different types of tumors, in order to be able to think of new strategies for treatment and management of the disease.

  • Sea horses. To know. Protect. Conserve

    The Fisheries Biology and Hydroecology group focuses its research on monitoring the seahorse populations in Ria Formosa, promoting mitigation actions in order to contribute to their conservation.

  • Augmented reality through the five senses

    Project aims to model the environment around the user, leading him to experience, through augmented reality, visual, taste, hearing, olfactory and tactile information.

  • Connecting culture, creativity and tourism

    The Creatour project aims to develop creative tourism destinations in small cities and rural areas.

  • Sea plants at table

    The XtremeBio project identified several common species in Ria Formosa with a nutritional profile suitable for human consumption and with potential for use in the food, pharmaceutical and cosmetic industry.

See our R&D centres
rni-list
Research Centres

Centre of Electronics, Optoelectronics and Telecommunications (CEOT)
Research Centre in Arts and Communication (CIAC)
Centre for Biomedical Research (CBMR)

Research Centre for Tourism, Sustainability and Well-being (CinTurs)
Centre for Marine and Environmental Research (CIMA)
Interdisciplinary Center for Archaeology and Evolution of Human Behaviour (ICArEHB)
Research Hubs / Management Units
Center for Advanced Studies in Management and Economics - Scientific Hub of the University of Algarve (CEFAGEUALG)
Center of Archaeology, Arts and Heritage Sciences (CEAACP)
Center for Environmental and Sustainability Research (CENSE)
Centre for Research in Psychology of the Universidade Autónoma de Lisboa (CIP/UAL)
Center for Health Technology and Services Research (CINTESIS)
Centre for Tourism Research, Development and Innovation (CITUR)
Institute of Mediterranean Agricultural and Environmental Sciences (MED)
Testimonials

    Peter Schulze

    Vasilis Sagris
    ​​​​​​​Greece

  • “Research here is a key area, taken very seriously.”

    Nathália Brandolim Becker
    ​​​​​​​Brazil
